title: ANSSI - Agence Nationale de Sécurité des Systèmes d'Information du Burkina Faso (official site)
description: Official site of Burkina Faso's national information-systems security agency (ANSSI-BF), supervised by the Ministry of Digital Transition. Domestic institutional issuer, but no explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content found.

title: Articles - ANSSI Burkina Faso (blog) — Renforcement de la coopération numérique: le Club des DSI reçu par l'ANSSI
description: ANSSI-BF blog post dated 23 July 2025 on a digital-cooperation meeting with a club of IT directors. Verified via WebFetch: no mention of post-quantum, quantum-safe cryptography, PQC, or quantum-resistant migration.

title: IA: Quels enjeux pour la sécurité numérique? - ANSSI Burkina Faso (blog)
description: ANSSI-BF blog article on AI and digital security challenges. Domestic institutional issuer; topic is artificial intelligence, no explicit PQC reference.

title: Burkina Faso procède à la validation de sa Stratégie nationale 2025-2029 de lutte contre la cybercriminalité
description: Trade-press (Africa Cybersecurity Magazine) coverage of Burkina Faso's validation of its 2025-2029 national anti-cybercrime strategy (SNLCC), 26 Nov 2024. Journalism, not an institutional source; no PQC mention reported.

title: Le Burkina Faso dévoile ses 12 chantiers numériques pour 2030
description: Journalism (We Are Tech Africa) on Burkina Faso's 12 digital priorities to 2030. Not institutional issuer; general cybersecurity/digital-sovereignty focus, no explicit post-quantum cryptography.

title: ABNORM - Agence Burkinabé de Normalisation, de la Métrologie et de la Qualité (official site)
description: Burkina Faso's national standards body (ABNORM), ISO member. Domestic institutional issuer, but standardization priorities listed are food/electro-technical/environmental/construction; no PQC or quantum-safe cryptography standard found.

title: ABNORM - Agence Burkinabé de Normalisation, de Métrologie et de la Qualité — ISO member page
description: ISO member listing for Burkina Faso's standards body ABNORM. Confirms ABNORM is the national standards organisation; no Burkina-issued PQC standard referenced.

title: L'Agence Nationale de Sécurité des Systèmes d'Information (ANSSI) — UNIDIR Cyber Policy Portal entity
description: UNIDIR Cyber Policy Portal entity record for ANSSI Burkina Faso. International-body database entry (not a domestic document); describes the agency's mandate, no PQC content.

title: CYBERWELLNESS PROFILE BURKINA FASO (ITU)
description: ITU country cyberwellness profile for Burkina Faso. International-body (ITU) document, not domestic; general cybersecurity posture, no post-quantum cryptography reference.

title: Burkina Faso National CIRT Establishment - ITU project
description: ITU project page on establishment of Burkina Faso's national CIRT. International-body project record, not a domestic document; no PQC mention.
